# terrible_cisco_dnac_wireless_enterprise_ssid (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `aaaOverride` (Boolean) Aaa Override.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `authKeyMgmt` (String) Takes string inputs for the AKMs that should be set true. Possible AKM values dot1x,dot1x_ft, dot1x_sha, psk, psk_ft, psk_sha, owe, sae, sae_ft.
- `basicServiceSetClientIdleTimeout` (Number) Basic Service Set Client Idle Timeout.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `clientExclusionTimeout` (Number) Client Exclusion Timeout.
- `clientRateLimit` (Number) Client Rate Limit (in bits per second).
- `coverageHoleDetectionEnable` (Boolean) Coverage Hole Detection Enable.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `enableBasicServiceSetMaxIdle` (Boolean) Enable Basic Service Set Max Idle.
- `enableBroadcastSSID` (Boolean) Enable Broadcase SSID.
- `enableClientExclusion` (Boolean) Enable Client Exclusion.
- `enableDirectedMulticastService` (Boolean) Enable Directed Multicast Service.
- `enableFastLane` (Boolean) Enable FastLane.
- `enableMACFiltering` (Boolean) Enable MAC Filtering.
- `enableNeighborList` (Boolean) Enable Neighbor List.
- `enableSessionTimeOut` (Boolean) Enable Session Timeout.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `fastTransition` (String) Fast Transition.
- `ghz24Policy` (String) Ghz24 Policy.
- `ghz6PolicyClientSteering` (Boolean) Ghz6 Policy Client Steering.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `mfpClientProtection` (String) Management Frame Protection Client.
- `multiPSKSettings` (String) Wireless Enterprise Ssid's multiPSKSettings.
- `name` (String) SSID NAME.
- `nasOptions` (String) Nas Options.
- `passphrase` (String) Passphrase.
- `policyProfileName` (String) Policy Profile Name.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `profileName` (String) Profile Name.
- `protectedManagementFrame` (String) (Required applicable for Security Type WPA3_PERSONAL, WPA3_ENTERPRISE, OPEN_SECURED) and (Optional, Required Applicable for Security Type WPA2_WPA3_PERSONAL and WPA2_WPA3_ENTERPRISE).
- `radioPolicy` (String) Radio Policy Enum.
- `rsnCipherSuiteCcmp256` (Boolean) Rsn Cipher Suite Ccmp256.
- `rsnCipherSuiteGcmp128` (Boolean) Rsn Cipher Suite Gcmp 128.
- `rsnCipherSuiteGcmp256` (Boolean) Rsn Cipher Suite Gcmp256.
- `securityLevel` (String) Security Level.
- `sessionTimeOut` (Number) Session Time Out.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `ssidName` (String) SsidName path parameter. Enter the SSID name to be deleted.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `trafficType` (String) Traffic Type Enum (voicedata or data ).
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `dnac_response` (String) A dictionary or list with the response returned by the Cisco DNAC Python SDK
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
